name: Little Horus Aximand
titles: ‘Little’ Horus Aximand Captain of the 5 th Company, Half-moon of the Mournival
lore: Nicknamed ‘Little Horus’ for his uncanny resemblance to the Warmaster, Horus Aximand was a high-ranking captain of the Sons of Horus and a member of Horus’ Mournival. Following the massacre of his former brethren on Isstvan III, Aximand was haunted by dreams of his former brother Garviel Loken and was noted to have privately harboured doubts about his decision to side with the Warmaster. Fighting at the vanguard of the Traitor forces, his every action sought to assuage his conflicted psyche. Despite being seriously wounded on several occasions, Horus Aximand commanded several notable actions during the Horus Heresy.
